name: utils
purpose: Shared utilities for health check scripts: ROOT_DIR discovery, safe command execution, safe JSON parse, safe file line reader.
notes: CJS module. Consumed by all 11 checkers via require('../lib/utils'). Exports: ROOT_DIR, runCommandSafe, safeParse, safeReadLines, findProjectRoot. Contains Windows-specific .cmd shim logic for npm/npx/gh. MAX_FILE_SIZE guard (10MB) on safeReadLines. No SoNash-specific data paths -- fully portable. entry_point: false, shells_out: true (execFileSync), test_coverage: true, is_copy_of: null, tool_deps: ['node'], module_system: 'cjs'

name: scoring
purpose: Metric scoring engine: scoreMetric (benchmark-based 0-100), computeGrade (A-F), sparkline generator, computeTrend (window-based direction), compositeScore (weighted average).
notes: CJS module. Copied from .claude/skills/hook-ecosystem-audit/scripts/lib/scoring.js per file header comment -- health scripts are intentionally self-contained. Consumers: composite.js (compositeScore, computeGrade), dimensions.js (computeGrade), checkers (scoreMetric). Fully portable: no SoNash data paths, no external deps. entry_point: false, shells_out: false, test_coverage: true (scoring.test.js + scoring.property.test.js), is_copy_of: '.claude/skills/hook-ecosystem-audit/scripts/lib/scoring.js', tool_deps: [], module_system: 'cjs'

name: dimensions
purpose: Dimension mapping layer: 14 named drill-down dimensions mapped to 9 categories with checker field references and metricKey arrays.
sanitize_fields: DIMENSIONS (Data Effectiveness dimension is TDMS-specific; debt-aging/debt-velocity reference TDMS metric keys)
notes: CJS module. DIMENSIONS array: 14 entries covering all 9 categories. SoNash-specific dimensions: 'data-effectiveness' (lifecycle-scores TDMS concept), 'debt-aging', 'debt-velocity' (TDMS S0/S1 severity). Remaining 11 dimensions are portable. getDimensionDetail() extracts per-dimension metric breakdown from checkerResults. Consumers: composite.js only. entry_point: false, shells_out: false, test_coverage: true (dimensions.test.js), is_copy_of: null, tool_deps: [], module_system: 'cjs'

name: composite
purpose: Composite scoring engine: maps 11 checkers to 9 weighted categories, aggregates dimension scores, returns final composite score and grade.
sanitize_fields: CATEGORY_WEIGHTS (Data Effectiveness weight 0.15 is SoNash-specific; needs replacement for JASON-OS)
CHECKER_TO_CATEGORY (data-effectiveness and debt-health entries reference SoNash-specific checkers)
notes: CJS module. CATEGORY_WEIGHTS: Code Quality 0.15, Security 0.13, Technical Debt 0.12, Infrastructure 0.1, Process & Workflow 0.1, Testing 0.09, Learning & Patterns 0.08, Documentation 0.08, Data Effectiveness 0.15 (sums to 1.0). CHECKER_TO_CATEGORY maps all 11 checkers. Exports: computeCompositeScore, CATEGORY_WEIGHTS, CHECKER_TO_CATEGORY. entry_point: false, shells_out: false, test_coverage: true (composite.test.js + composite.property.test.js), is_copy_of: null, tool_deps: [], module_system: 'cjs'

name: health-log
purpose: Health score JSONL persistence and trend computation: appends run results to ecosystem-health-log.jsonl, computes delta and trend across runs.
notes: ESM module (uses export keyword + import.meta.url + fileURLToPath). CLI entry point: node health-log.js --append < result.json. Exports: appendHealthScore, getLatestScores, computeTrend. Fail-closed on safe-fs unavailability (refuses writes). Uses createRequire() for CJS interop with scoring.js and safe-fs. ecosystem-health-log.jsonl is the DATA CONTRACT read by mid-session-alerts.js (score degradation check). entry_point: true (CLI --append mode), shells_out: false, test_coverage: true (health-log.test.js), is_copy_of: null, tool_deps: ['node'], module_system: 'esm'

name: warning-lifecycle
purpose: Warning lifecycle management for warnings.jsonl: create, acknowledge, resolve, mark-stale, query, and stats operations.
sanitize_fields: scripts/reviews/dist/* dependency (compiled TypeScript from SoNash reviews system -- heavy dependency, not portable as-is)
notes: ESM module (uses export keyword + import.meta.url + fileURLToPath). Uses createRequire() for CJS interop. Exports: createWarning, acknowledgeWarning, resolveWarning, markStale, queryWarnings, getWarningStats. WARNING: depends on scripts/reviews/dist/ compiled artifacts -- these are compiled TypeScript and not tracked in git as source. This is the most heavily coupled lib in the health subsystem. WarningRecord schema (Zod-validated) lives in scripts/reviews/dist/lib/schemas/warning. Lifecycle states: new -> acknowledged -> resolved; auto-stale at 30 days. entry_point: false, shells_out: false, test_coverage: true (warning-lifecycle.test.js), is_copy_of: null, tool_deps: ['node'], module_system: 'esm'

name: mid-session-alerts
purpose: Lightweight mid-session alert detection: aged deferred items (>30 days), duplicate deferrals (7-day window), score degradation (10+ point drop). Designed to run from post-commit hooks under 2 seconds.
notes: ESM module (uses export keyword + import.meta.url + fileURLToPath). CLI entry point: node scripts/health/lib/mid-session-alerts.js (direct spawn from hooks). Exports: runMidSessionChecks(opts). Uses createRequire() for CJS interop (read-jsonl, safe-fs, reviews dist). THREE alert types: deferred-aging (warning severity), duplicate-deferrals (warning severity), score-degradation (error severity). COOLDOWN: 1-hour per alert type, persisted to .alerts-cooldown.json. SIDE EFFECTS when not skipSideEffects: (1) createWarningRecord via reviews/dist, (2) surfaceHookWarning via execFileSync of append-hook-warning.js, (3) writeCooldown. All side effects are best-effort (catch blocks swallow errors). opts.skipSideEffects=true for test isolation. D3b confirmation: this is the direct async-spawn target from commit-tracker hook -- invoked as subprocess via node CLI. entry_point: true (CLI spawn target), shells_out: true (execFileSync for append-hook-warning.js), test_coverage: true (mid-session-alerts.test.js at health/ top level), is_copy_of: null, tool_deps: ['node'], module_system: 'esm'

name: mid-session-alerts.test
purpose: Tests for mid-session alert detection: deferred aging, duplicate deferrals, score degradation, cooldown enforcement, empty-state baseline.
notes: ESM module (uses import). Test framework: node:test. Uses dynamic import() for mid-session-alerts.js (ESM). Uses mkdtempSync for temp directory isolation. skipSideEffects:true throughout. 7 test cases covering all 3 alert types + cooldown + empty state. test_for: scripts/health/lib/mid-session-alerts.js, entry_point: false, shells_out: false, test_coverage: false, is_copy_of: null, tool_deps: ['node'], module_system: 'esm'

name: run-health-check.test
purpose: Integration tests for the health check system: scoreMetric/computeGrade boundary values, DIMENSIONS count/categories, computeCompositeScore weighted scoring, all 10 checker export contracts.
sanitize_fields: checker export list (data-effectiveness checker not in this test's list -- the 10-checker list excludes it, suggesting it was added later)
notes: CJS module. Test framework: node:test. 4 describe blocks: scoring.js boundaries, dimensions.js (confirms 14 dimensions + 9 categories), composite.js weighted scoring (confirms 9 categoryScores + 14 dimensionScores), checker exports (10 of 11 checkers -- data-effectiveness missing from this integration test). test_for: run-health-check.js, composite.js, dimensions.js, scoring.js, all checkers. entry_point: false, shells_out: false, test_coverage: false, is_copy_of: null, tool_deps: ['node'], module_system: 'cjs'

name: composite.test
purpose: Unit tests for composite.js: CATEGORY_WEIGHTS validation, CHECKER_TO_CATEGORY completeness, computeCompositeScore correctness including no_data handling, partial data, score degradation from poor inputs.
notes: CJS module. Test framework: node:test. 8 test cases in 3 describe blocks. makeAllGoodResults() fixture covers all 11 checkers with full metric sets. Validates weight sum ~1.0, all 9 categories mapped, no_data graceful handling. test_for: scripts/health/lib/composite.js, entry_point: false, shells_out: false, module_system: 'cjs'

name: composite.property.test
purpose: Property-based tests for composite.js using fast-check: score always in [0,100], grade always valid, no_data handled consistently.
notes: CJS module. Requires fast-check npm package. Property tests generate arbitrary checker result shapes. test_for: scripts/health/lib/composite.js, entry_point: false, shells_out: false, module_system: 'cjs'

name: scoring.test
purpose: Unit tests for scoring.js: scoreMetric boundary values for both directions, computeGrade thresholds, sparkline output, computeTrend direction/delta, compositeScore weighted aggregation.
notes: CJS module. Test framework: node:test. Fully portable -- tests pure numeric logic with no SoNash-specific data. test_for: scripts/health/lib/scoring.js, entry_point: false, shells_out: false, module_system: 'cjs'

name: scoring.property.test
purpose: Property-based tests for scoring.js using fast-check: scoreMetric always returns [0,100] score and valid rating, computeGrade always returns valid letter.
notes: CJS module. Requires fast-check npm package. Fully portable. test_for: scripts/health/lib/scoring.js, entry_point: false, shells_out: false, module_system: 'cjs'

name: dimensions.test
purpose: Unit tests for dimensions.js: DIMENSIONS count (14), required fields on each dimension, all 9 categories represented, getDimensionDetail behavior.
sanitize_fields: DIMENSIONS count assertion (14) -- will need updating if TDMS-specific dimensions are removed for JASON-OS port)
notes: CJS module. Test framework: node:test. Dimension count hardcoded to 14 in assertion -- porting without TDMS dimensions would require updating this test. test_for: scripts/health/lib/dimensions.js, entry_point: false, shells_out: false, module_system: 'cjs'

name: health-log.test
purpose: Unit tests for health-log.js: computeDelta trend classification, summarizeDimensions bucketing, getLatestScores (ESM via dynamic import), computeTrend direction mapping.
notes: CJS module with dynamic import() for ESM health-log.js exports. Test framework: node:test. Graceful skip if safe-fs unavailable (ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND guard). Uses pathToFileURL for ESM import. Tests pure helpers via re-implementation pattern (computeDelta, summarizeDimensions) to avoid ESM import complexity. test_for: scripts/health/lib/health-log.js, entry_point: false, shells_out: false, module_system: 'cjs'

name: warning-lifecycle.test
purpose: Tests for warning-lifecycle.js: createWarning, acknowledgeWarning, resolveWarning, markStale, queryWarnings, getWarningStats lifecycle transitions.
sanitize_fields: requires scripts/reviews/dist/ compiled artifacts at runtime
notes: ESM module (uses import). Lives at scripts/health/lib/ top level (not in __tests__/). Test framework: node:test. Uses mkdtempSync for isolation. Imports directly from warning-lifecycle.js (both ESM). DEPENDENCY WARNING: test requires scripts/reviews/dist/ at test runtime -- cannot be run independently of the reviews TypeScript build. test_for: scripts/health/lib/warning-lifecycle.js, entry_point: false, shells_out: false, module_system: 'esm'

name: code-quality.test
purpose: Unit tests for checkers/code-quality.js: TypeScript error counting, ESLint error/warning parsing, pattern violations, circular deps.
sanitize_fields: npm script names in mock runCommandSafe output
notes: CJS. Uses require.cache mutation pattern to mock utils.js (mutable fn refs). node:test framework. test_for: scripts/health/checkers/code-quality.js, module_system: 'cjs'

name: data-effectiveness.test
purpose: Unit tests for checkers/data-effectiveness.js: lifecycle-scores.jsonl parsing, avg score computation, orphan detection.
notes: CJS. Largest checker test at 18.5KB -- TDMS lifecycle concept is complex. test_for: scripts/health/checkers/data-effectiveness.js. module_system: 'cjs'. Not portable (TDMS lifecycle-scores concept).

name: debt-health.test
purpose: Unit tests for checkers/debt-health.js: MASTER_DEBT.jsonl parsing, S0/S1 severity counts, resolution rate.
notes: CJS. TDMS-specific. test_for: scripts/health/checkers/debt-health.js. module_system: 'cjs'. Not portable.

name: documentation.test
purpose: Unit tests for checkers/documentation.js: SESSION_CONTEXT.md staleness, misplaced docs count, broken links.
notes: CJS. test_for: scripts/health/checkers/documentation.js. module_system: 'cjs'.

name: ecosystem-integration.test
purpose: Unit tests for checkers/ecosystem-integration.js: review-metrics.jsonl parsing, CI failure counting, SonarCloud issue detection.
notes: CJS. Partially portable (CI failure check via gh is generic; pr-review metrics are SoNash-specific). test_for: scripts/health/checkers/ecosystem-integration.js. module_system: 'cjs'.

purpose: Unit tests for checkers/hook-pipeline.js: hook-warnings-log.jsonl parsing, override counting, noise ratio computation.
sanitize_fields: state file paths in ROOT_DIR mock
notes: CJS. Uses require.cache mutation + mutable fn ref pattern for utils mock. test_for: scripts/health/checkers/hook-pipeline.js. module_system: 'cjs'.

notes: CJS. Updated 2026-04-07 (most recent checker test). test_for: scripts/health/checkers/learning-effectiveness.js. module_system: 'cjs'.

purpose: Unit tests for checkers/pattern-enforcement.js: warned-files.json hotspot counting, repeat offender detection.
notes: CJS. test_for: scripts/health/checkers/pattern-enforcement.js. module_system: 'cjs'.

notes: CJS. test_for: scripts/health/checkers/security.js. module_system: 'cjs'.
